name: Baked Walleye in Sour Cream
recipeIngredient: Salt and pepper                     2 tablespoons Finely minced onion
1 cup Sour cream                        1/2 cup Soft butter
1 3-lb. walleye, scaled and           2 tablespoons Lemon juice
1/4 teaspoon Thyme                               1/2 cup Grated Parmesan cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Scale but don't skin the walleye and pick a 3-3 1/2-pounder.
2. Salt and pepper the fish.
3. Mix the minced onions with soft butter and spread inside and outside the fish.
4. Lay the bacon strips on the bottom of a shallow baking dish and place in the fish.
5. In a bowl, mix the sour cream, thyme, grated cheese, bread crumbs, and lemon juice and spread the mixture over the fish.
6. Bake at 325 degrees for about 30 minutes.
7. Serve with tossed salad and baked potato.
